NCBI's organism field labels this as "Picrophilus oshimae DSM 9789" but the strain field correctly says DSM 9790 which IS the P. torridus type strain (Schleper et al. 1995). The deposited sequence is genuine P. torridus; only NCBI's organism-name metadata is mislabeled. Confirmed via strain check + literature.
